# 🖼️ Referências de Mídia - URLs CDN Atuais

## Hero Section Background
https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663598406223/iNniAdMAKZ3kbfss6mvqm6/hero-asia-mission-T5vtH4Ewby8ZwFx7dDK2rB.webp

## Logo (Footer)
https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663598406223/iNniAdMAKZ3kbfss6mvqm6/bridge-icon-5BLCtSSJPpFzPjJUP6CKFy.webp

## Local Media (Public Folder)
- /logos/cieam.png
- /images/cities/guangzhou.webp
- /images/cities/shanghai.png
- /images/cities/tokyo.jpg

## Para Migrar para Local

Edite os componentes que usam CDN e substitua pelas URLs locais:
- HeroSection.tsx: backgroundImage
- Footer.tsx: logo img src
- CitiesSection.tsx: city images

Exemplo:
FROM: https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/.../hero-asia-mission-T5vtH4Ewby8ZwFx7dDK2rB.webp
TO:   /images/hero/asia-mission.webp
